mapper.sql: id, user_id, test_id, session_id, total_score, started_time, submitted_time, time_limit_seconds, time_spent_seconds, record_status, created_time, is_deleted
rr.id, rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rr.session_id, rr.total_score, rr.started_time, rr.submitted_time, rr.time_limit_seconds, rr.time_spent_seconds, rr.record_status, rr.created_time, rr.is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_record ( user_id, test_id, session_id, total_score, started_time, submitted_time, time_limit_seconds, time_spent_seconds, record_status, created_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{testId}, #{sessionId}, #{totalScore}, #{startedTime}, #{submittedTime}, #{timeLimitSeconds}, #{timeSpentSeconds}, #{recordStatus}, #{createdTime}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.sql:
ORDER BY rr.created_time
ASC DESC , rr.id DESC

ORDER BY rr.created_time
ASC DESC , rr.id DESC

ORDER BY rr.created_time
ASC DESC , rr.id DESC

ORDER BY rr.created_time
ASC DESC , rr.id DESC
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id

SELECT FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id

SELECT FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_record SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(total_score) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND total_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT FROM reading_record rr WHERE rr.test_id = #{testId} AND rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 AND rr.record_status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'PAUSED') ORDER BY rr.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_record SET started_time = #{startedTime}, submitted_time = #{submittedTime}, time_limit_seconds = #{timeLimitSeconds}, time_spent_seconds = #{timeSpentSeconds}, record_status = #{recordStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
